title: 24 Daily Elf Mischief Report Letters & Envelopes - To Send to Santa - Christmas Countdown - Elves Behaving Badly
features: Daily elf mischief report letters to send to santa
The start of the letter reads 'last night your naughty little elves were up to mischief again. guess what they did?' You can finish the letter and send it to santa
It is a great way for children to be good this christmas.
